questions.question: Describe the primary difference between a stack and a queue data structure. Provide an example of each.
What is the time complexity of the average-case search operation in a hash table? Provide a Big O notation to support your answer.
questions.hint: Focus on the time complexity only

questions.question: Write an algorithm to insert a new element into an empty array, maintaining the existing elements in ascending order.
questions.hint: Use a programming language of your choice
